title: Captain Cautious
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Cautious.jpg]] |name="Captain Cautious" |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], over [[Ova]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Ah, Number Two—There was a serious problem on your last report.''"
"''Yes, sir?''"
"''Whilst the content was adequate, you failed to use the correct font…|Captain Cautious and [[Number Two]]|[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]]}} "'''Captain Cautious'''" was the nickname given to the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Captain Cautious's freighter|freighter]] which made routine freight jobs for the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. He was known for being indecisive when it came to important decisions, but a stickler for detail. He panicked when his ship was destroyed by the [[Infinity Gate]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Republic individuals]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
